versions.description: Pre-release 8.0 — over-the-air updates, BLE pairing overhaul, and richer telemetry
changelog: Over-the-air (OTA) firmware updates over BLE from the mobile app, with automatic rollback if a new image fails to boot
Reworked BLE pairing and bonding: auto-enters pairing on boot, on-screen pairing indicator, secure bonding with stale-bond recovery, and more reliable reconnection
Expanded FastLink telemetry with richer ESC and BMS data, including a command to read ESC hardware info
Improved reliability and diagnostics: watchdog (WDT) panic recovery with ELF coredumps, boot-history logging, and USB diagnostic tooling
Display and throttle refinements (LVGL v9 UI, updated variometer scaling and throttle deadzone) plus refreshed ESP32, NimBLE, and ArduinoJson dependencies

versions.description: Add ESC LED and motor beep
changelog: Adds ESC status LED modes for supported ESCs in certain flight states
ESC motor beep tones on arm and disarm events
Fixes the center climb-rate divider contrast when the display is in dark mode

versions.description: Smarter BMS temps, binary BLE telemetry, refreshed dependencies
changelog: Smarter BMS temperature handling with fewer false alarms from bad or missing sensors
Standardized on packed binary BLE telemetry format, removing legacy path
Refreshed platform and library dependencies (ESP32, NimBLE, ArduinoJson, and more)

versions.description: Reliability, smarter throttle, and BLE refinements
changelog: Improved sensor handling (invalid readings as NaN, fewer false alerts)
Full-range mode-aware throttle and smoother cruise control
NimBLE migration for BLE stability; expanded telemetry/config fields
Cleaner alert flow (warning vs critical); simplified vibration path; temperature and climb/vario display updates

versions.description: Enhanced monitoring, diagnostics, and system health
changelog: New system health monitors for early detection of hardware initialization failures
Enhanced ESC TWAI, BMS CAN, and barometer startup status tracking
Improved alerts and feedback with consistent error categorization
Firmware build date logging for easier debugging
Recommended for all users including RC1 users

versions.description: Improved diagnostics and smoother throttle response
changelog: New variometer display show altitude changes
Display BMS, ESC, and internal notifications for warnings and critical alerts
Enhanced throttle smoothing especially for chill mode

versions.description: Enhanced haptic feedback and system performance
changelog: Enhanced haptic feedback with precise buzzer control and dedicated vibration motor task
Improved throttle and cruise control with smoother transitions and expanded activation states
Updated BLE communication with structured firmware version transmission
Better task management for vibration operations and overall system performance
